featureName: BUG-020-008: parseIntEnv silently substitutes 0 for 8 required SST int config values

executionHistory.summary: Code-review finding H-1 (P0 SST NO-DEFAULTS violation) filed by user. internal/config/config.go L1777-1789 defined parseIntEnv(key, defaultVal int) int which silently substituted defaultVal on empty or unparseable env input. 8 call-sites at L475/L481/L486/L488/L568/L569/L576/L577 passed 0 as silent fallback for SST-required int values. Created 8-artifact bug folder.

executionHistory.expansionReason: parent-expand discovery and documentation phases because nested runtime lacks runSubagent capability for bubbles.discovery / bubbles.documentation specialist dispatch; bubbles.bug already covered these phases at packet creation time and the parent-expand entry records that provenance explicitly per Gate G022
executionHistory.summary: Parent-expanded provenance entry for discovery + documentation phases.

TDD code change. RED captured: 17 of 18 sub-tests in TestBUG020008_* FAIL against pre-fix tree. Implementation: replaced parseIntEnv silent-default helper with mustParseIntEnv(key) (int, error) fail-loud helper; removed 8 silent-default call-sites from cfg literal; added error-accumulating loop after cfg literal populating the 8 int fields and folding errors into new Config.intLoadErrs; folded intLoadErrs into Validate()'s consolidated missing-keys error. Reconciled 5 pre-existing tests that previously encoded the silent-default behavior. Augmented setRequiredEnv with the 8 keys at SST yaml values. GREEN: all 18 TestBUG020008_* sub-tests PASS; full internal/config/ race suite PASS (28.929s); full go test ./internal/... PASS across 70+ packages. Helper-eradication grep exits 1. Change boundary: internal/config/config.go + internal/config/mustparseintenv_test.go (NEW) + internal/config/validate_test.go + bug folder artifacts only.

certification.auditNote: Real code change (NOT artifact-only). RED captured (17 of 18 TestBUG020008_* sub-tests FAIL pre-fix), GREEN confirmed (all 18 PASS post-fix). Helper parseIntEnv(key, defaultVal int) int replaced with mustParseIntEnv(key) (int, error). 8 call-sites migrated to error-accumulating loop; intLoadErrs folded into Validate()'s consolidated missing-keys error. 5 pre-existing tests reconciled to the new fail-loud contract. Full internal/config/ race suite PASS (28.929s). Full go test ./internal/... PASS across 70+ packages. Helper-eradication grep exits 1. Change boundary: 3 source files + bug folder. Zero foreign artifacts touched. SHIP_IT.
